3146580.name: Stream Simulator
3146580.description:
Stream Simulator is a fun and unique idle game where you collect coins, purchase mini-games, and build your ultimate gaming library!

Gameplay Features:

🎮 Collect & Earn – Click to earn money and play mini-games to boost your income. The more you play, the more you earn!

🕹 Expanding Game Library – Browse and purchase a variety of mini-games, each with unique genres and gameplay mechanics.

💰 Play, Spend, Repeat! – Play endlessly, earn money, unlock new games, and keep the fun going!

Build your collection, master mini-games, and experience the ultimate gaming loop in Stream Simulator!
3146580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
